item.title: Please can the bins at the recycling centre be emptied, 14th March
item.description:
Please can the recycling bins be emptied? They are extremely full and need emptying. Thank you!!!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HGVs parking illegally and blocking the road, 14th March
item.description:
Despite clear signs HGVs park on the 'new' roundabout at Jurgen Road junction London Road in Purfleet, RM19. Also park on the approach to this roundabout which blocks the view of the pedestrian crossings and footpaths. Will not be long before someone is hurt or killed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Thurrock
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No entry signs, 14th March
item.description:

item.title: Abandoned trolley with rubbish inside, 14th March
item.description:
In location ///divide.bucked.locker there is an abandoned trolley with bags inside
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree require crown reduction / extensive pruning over full tree, 14th March
item.description:
The beautiful mature tree outside our house (number 7 beadon road) received a light prune a few years ago but it needs more extensive work to reduce its footprint / overhang and remove the unhealthy/ dead branches throughout the tree. Even modest winds such as those this week result is large pieces of debris falling on driveway and our cars. Our neighbour in number 9 is unwell and will find it difficult to clear the debris. The more extensive work done on the tree opposite ( outside number 2) last year would address the problems and enhance the tree aesthetically.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Beadon Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
